prompt: Create requirements doc for notification system using scripted answers

assertions.name: ears-format
assertions.description: FRs use 'shall' with event-driven/state-driven/ubiquitous EARS patterns

assertions.name: sequential-ids
assertions.description: FR-NNN and NFR-NNN IDs are sequential with no gaps

assertions.name: measurable-nfrs
assertions.description: NFRs contain quantitative values (numbers, percentiles, timeframes)

assertions.name: post-review-ran
assertions.description: review-summary.txt exists and references rule IDs
